hardware: macOS (Apple Silicon, local LM Studio vs local Ollama)

falkordb_graphrag_ollama.notes: Completed cleanly. Slow ingestion due to CPU-only Ollama loading state swap.

falkordb_graphrag_lm_studio.notes: Indexing completed 3.7x faster (162.99s). Query hit LM Studio's default context window limit (OpenAI 400 bad request), triggering retries.

lightrag.notes: Indexed successfully in ~2.5 mins, but query keyword extraction timed out after 8 minutes on Ollama, saving empty context.

fast_graphrag.notes: Ran for 2h 16m due to tenacity retries on timed-out requests. Deep-nested instructor prompts timed out on local Ollama (>180s per chunk).

vanilla_vector_rag_lm_studio.notes: Bypasses graph indexing completely. Performs fast chunk embeddings and a single direct LLM call on LM Studio.
